entries.question: How do I make a booking?
entries.answer: Search for your destination, select dates, choose your preferred options (flight, hotel, car), and complete payment. You'll receive instant confirmation via email with all booking details.

entries.question: Can I book for someone else?
entries.answer: Yes! Enter the traveler's details during booking. The confirmation will be sent to your email, and you can forward it to them. Ensure names match ID documents exactly.

entries.question: What payment methods do you accept?
entries.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and bank transfers. Affirm financing available for bookings over $500.

entries.question: Is my booking confirmed immediately?
entries.answer: Most bookings are confirmed instantly. Some hotels and airlines may take 24-48 hours for confirmation. You'll receive email updates at every step.

entries.question: How do I access my booking details?
entries.answer: Access your bookings anytime via 'My Trips' after logging in. You can also use your booking reference and last name on our website without logging in.

entries.question: How do I check in for my flight?
entries.answer: Check in online 24-48 hours before departure via the airline's website or app. We'll email you check-in reminders. Some airlines offer mobile boarding passes.

entries.question: What is the baggage allowance?
entries.answer: Baggage allowance varies by airline and ticket class. Check your booking confirmation or the airline's website. We display baggage info during booking.

entries.question: Can I select my seat?
entries.answer: Seat selection is available during booking or via 'Manage Booking'. Some airlines charge extra for preferred seats. Premium and business class include free seat selection.

entries.question: What if my flight is delayed or cancelled?
entries.answer: We'll notify you immediately of any changes. For delays, check the airline's app for updates. For cancellations, we'll help rebook or refund. Call our 24/7 support line.

entries.question: Do you offer travel insurance?
entries.answer: Yes! Comprehensive travel insurance is available during booking from $15/day. Covers trip cancellation, medical emergencies, lost luggage, and 24/7 assistance.

entries.question: What time is check-in and check-out?
entries.answer: Standard check-in is 3 PM, check-out is 11 AM. Early check-in and late check-out may be available upon request. Contact the hotel directly or use our concierge service.

entries.question: Can I request a specific room?
entries.answer: Add room preferences (high floor, quiet room, connecting rooms) in the special requests field during booking. We'll forward requests to the hotel. Not guaranteed but usually accommodated.

entries.question: Is breakfast included?
entries.answer: Breakfast inclusion varies by rate plan. Look for 'Breakfast Included' tag during booking. You can also add breakfast during booking for a discounted rate.

entries.question: How do I cancel my hotel booking?
entries.answer: Cancel via 'My Trips' or contact support. Free cancellation varies by rate plan - check your booking terms. Refunds typically process within 5-7 business days.

entries.question: What if I have issues at the hotel?
entries.answer: Contact our 24/7 support immediately. We can assist with room changes, billing disputes, and finding alternative accommodations if needed.

entries.question: What is your cancellation policy?
entries.answer: Cancellation policies vary by booking. Most hotels offer free cancellation up to 24-48 hours before check-in. Flights depend on fare type. Check your booking terms for details.

entries.question: How do I cancel my booking?
entries.answer: Go to 'My Trips', select your booking, and click 'Cancel'. Or contact our 24/7 support. You'll receive cancellation confirmation via email.

entries.question: Is there a cancellation fee?
entries.answer: Cancellation fees depend on timing and booking type. Cancel early (usually 48+ hours) to avoid fees. Some non-refundable bookings may not be eligible for refund.

entries.question: Can I get a partial refund?
entries.answer: Partial refunds are available for partially used bookings. Contact support to calculate your refund based on unused services. Processing takes 5-10 business days.

entries.question: What happens if I miss my flight?
entries.answer: Contact us immediately. We may be able to rebook you on the next available flight (subject to fare rules). No-shows typically forfeit the ticket value. Travel insurance may cover rebooking costs.

entries.question: How long do refunds take?
entries.answer: Refunds typically process in 5-10 business days to your original payment method. Airlines and hotels may take longer. You'll receive email confirmation when processed.

entries.question: How do I check my refund status?
entries.answer: Check refund status in 'My Trips' under your cancelled booking. Contact support if you don't see updates after 10 business days.

entries.question: Can I get a refund for travel insurance?
entries.answer: Travel insurance may be refundable if cancelled within 10 days of purchase and before trip departure. After that, premiums are non-refundable.

entries.question: What if my tour or activity is cancelled?
entries.answer: Full refund for operator-cancelled tours. We'll offer alternative options or process refund within 24 hours. Weather-related cancellations follow operator policy.

entries.question: Do you refund in the original currency?
entries.answer: Refunds are processed in the original payment currency. Exchange rate differences may apply. Bank fees are not covered by TravelEase.
